seoTitle: South Brisbane vs South Gladstone — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Brisbane and South Gladstone. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Brisbane vs South Gladstone: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Brisbane and South Gladstone.
heading: South Brisbane vs South Gladstone — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Brisbane, Queensland and South Gladstone, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Gladstone has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to South Brisbane (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Brisbane or South Gladstone safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Brisbane has a flood risk score of 48/100, while South Gladstone scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Brisbane scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. South Gladstone scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Brisbane or South Gladstone?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Gladstone has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.78% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
